meta.poznamky: Sekvence má penDown a forward(20) uvnitř smyčky ale chybí penUp + forward(15). Doplň.

cms.task_text: Kód má kreslit tečkovanou čáru, ale [hlp]chybí blok pro zvednutí pera[/hlp] a posun v mezeře. Doplňte chybějící bloky.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">5</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">5</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">15</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
